entries.text: Apple Pro Dark Theme & Magenta Highlights (Asphalt UI)
Renamed Command Center to 'Lura', embedded Global Tasks
Agentic Engine: URL-First Navigation Strategy for strict SPAs (X.com, YouTube)
Anti-Loop Pivot Guard: Prevents stuck agents on unresponsive UI elements
Overhauled the Onboarding Experience (BiamOS Engine + Agent Tutorials)
Removed ContextSidebar entirely; centralized all history and state into Lura Chat
Fixed Agent Infinite Refresh Bug on DOM-Ready Webviews
Fixed React State limit crash in getSnapshot caches
Moved 'No LLM' warnings cleanly into the Chat Stream (no floating overlays)
